summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Top Brasil Grill Portuguese restaurant website. All core features working correctly including hero section, navigation, menu highlights, digital menu tabs, reviews carousel, external links, Google Maps integration, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Hero section loads with background image and Portuguese text
Navigation links work correctly (Início, Sobre, Menu, Avaliações, Contacto)
About section displays with restaurant interior image
Menu highlights grid shows all 4 dishes (Tacacá, Maniçoba, Açaí, Coxinhas) with images
Full digital menu tabs work (Entradas, Pratos Principais, Sobremesas, Bebidas)
External links open correctly (TheFork, Uber Eats, Instagram, Facebook) with target='_blank'
Google Maps embed loads in location section
Mobile responsiveness works across all sections
Footer links and social icons work
All CTA buttons (Reservar Mesa, Pedir Online) have correct external links
